---
name: Data rights request (RGPD)

---

> **RGPD / GDPR** — Articles 15 to 20 give EU/EEA residents (and,
> by extension, anyone we serve) the right to access, rectify, erase,
> port, or restrict processing of their personal data. We honour these
> rights for all users, regardless of jurisdiction.

## Identity verification (required)

To protect your data, we must verify you are the account holder.

- [ ] Account email: _______________
- [ ] Account ID (from Settings → About): _______________
- [ ] I confirm I am the account holder (or a legally authorised representative
      — in which case, attach the power of attorney under "Documents" below).

## Type of request (tick all that apply)

- [ ] **Art. 15 — Right of access**: send me a copy of all my personal data
- [ ] **Art. 16 — Right of rectification**: correct inaccurate data (specify below)
- [ ] **Art. 17 — Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")**: delete my account and all data
- [ ] **Art. 18 — Right to restriction of processing**: pause processing while a dispute is resolved
- [ ] **Art. 19 — Notification obligation**: tell other processors we share with
- [ ] **Art. 20 — Right to data portability**: export my data in a machine-readable format (JSON + CSV)
- [ ] **Art. 21 — Right to object**: stop processing for direct marketing or other purposes
- [ ] **Art. 22 — Automated decision-making**: review any automated decision affecting me

## Details

Free-form description of the request (what data, what timeframe, any context):

<!-- Please write your request here -->

## Preferred delivery

- [ ] Encrypted ZIP attached to a reply email (PGP key: see SECURITY.md)
- [ ] Signed download link sent to my account email
- [ ] Mailed physical copy (only if legally required)

## Deadline

We will action your request within **30 days** of identity verification
(RGPD Art. 12 §3). For complex requests this may be extended by 60 days;
we will notify you if so.

## Documents

Attach (drag-and-drop, max 10 MB each):
- Identity document (passport, ID card, or driving licence — front only)
- Proof of address (utility bill, bank statement, max 3 months old)
- Power of attorney (if acting on behalf of the data subject)
- Any other supporting documents

## Contact

- **Data Protection Officer (DPO)**: dpo@myidentity.app
- **Privacy policy**: <https://myidentity.app/privacy>
- **DPA (Data Processing Agreement)**: <https://myidentity.app/dpa>
